subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast inhaled the fragrance of fidelity! Every reality among the divine verities and cosmic realities, whether essences or [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من شم رائحه الوفاء هر حقیقتی از حقائق الهیه و حقائق کونیه چه اعیان چه
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @material world a reflection of the spiritual, @firmness in the Covenant
